Start Your Project
Work with me

The fit is strongest when the work needs clear ownership.

I do my best work when one careful builder can carry the work from framing through launch. That can be a website, a web app, internal software, or a specialist system where the logic underneath needs real care.

Best fit Focused builds, not committee projects

I prefer projects where the technical decisions have real consequences for trust, money, operations, or the day-to-day usability of the product.

Where I add the most value

The work is broad, but the ownership is specific.

I do my best work on systems that need careful architecture: trading infrastructure, fintech products, cross-platform builds, and business software where getting the logic wrong costs real money, time, or trust. I am also happy to build websites and apps for clients who want one person carrying the whole thing, not a committee.

I'm probably not the right fit if you need a large retained team, or if the project is mostly content management with no custom engineering.

Websites and web apps

Marketing sites, product surfaces, and customer-facing builds that still need solid technical foundations.

Business software and automation

Operational tooling that reduces manual drift and gives the team a clearer picture of what is happening.

Internal tools and dashboards

Interfaces for teams who need the system state to be legible, auditable, and easy to act on.

Trading and fintech systems

Specialist work where authority, reconciliation, payouts, or trust-heavy flows deserve extra care.

Start the conversation
